shadow_event.query:
# Context Refresh Failed

workspace: /Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core

Command failed: /usr/local/bin/node scripts/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js --format size

Each VS Code window refreshes its own workspace independently.

transcript.content: codex context meter 删除掉； 新窗口不是这个仓库时，状态栏直接显示 Ctx: no workspace =》要 tooltip 里写清楚当前绑定的是哪个 workspace 路径 =〉要 果你同时开两个窗口：两个窗口各自独立刷新，各看各自 workspace =》需要
已经改了，而且只改独立扩展。 现在的行为是：
点击状态栏 有时候没有反应； 或比较慢；
这两个问题我已经针对性修了： 1. 点击有时没反应 原因是点击后才同步去跑命令，窗口要等结果回来才出现。 现在改成： - 点击后立刻打开小窗口 - 如果有缓存先显示缓存 - 没缓存就先显示 `Loading…` - 后台再异步刷新内容
`Ctx: error` 的意思很直接： `独立扩展在刷新 context 大小时失败了。`
已经补上了。 现在独立扩展会把这几种情况明确分开：

# Context Refresh Failed workspace: /Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core Command failed: /Applications/Visual Studio Code.app/Contents/Frameworks/Code Helper (Plugin).app/Contents/MacOS/Code Helper (Plugin) scripts/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js --format size Each VS Code window refreshes its own workspace independently.
根因就是你贴出来的这句： ```text /Applications/Visual Studio Code.app/.../Code Helper (Plugin) scripts/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js --format size ```

# Context Refresh Failed workspace: /Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core Command failed: /usr/local/bin/node scripts/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js --format size Each VS Code window refreshes its own workspace independently.
我已经把这个问题修到根上了。 根因不是 node 路径了，而是状态栏刷新走了完整 GC 判定链路，导致扩展里看起来像“点击没反应 / 刷新失败”。现在我把状态栏和详情窗口改成了 `host-only fast path`：

decision.archive_summary: Resolved VS Code context-status work: remove context meter; show `Ctx: no workspace` when not in repo; tooltip should clearly show the bound workspace path; each VS Code window refreshes independently for its own workspace; clicking the status bar should open immediately and load asynchronously with cache/Loading state; `Ctx: error` should explicitly indicate context refresh failure and distinguish failure modes.
decision.reasoning_summary: The active thread appears resolved by the last assistant turn claiming a root-cause fix for the context refresh failure. The earlier turns are implementation/spec context, not an open unresolved task. Keep the latest user turn in raw form automatically per runtime rules, but evict older solved raw turns. Preserve the durable behavior requirements as compact pins so future turns retain the product expectations without carrying the full transcript.

applied.archiveSummary: Resolved VS Code context-status work: remove context meter; show `Ctx: no workspace` when not in repo; tooltip should clearly show the bound workspace path; each VS Code window refreshes independently for its own workspace; clicking the status bar should open immediately and load asynchronously with cache/Loading state; `Ctx: error` should explicitly indicate context refresh failure and distinguish failure modes.
applied.reasoningSummary: The active thread appears resolved by the last assistant turn claiming a root-cause fix for the context refresh failure. The earlier turns are implementation/spec context, not an open unresolved task. Keep the latest user turn in raw form automatically per runtime rules, but evict older solved raw turns. Preserve the durable behavior requirements as compact pins so future turns retain the product expectations without carrying the full transcript.
